items.title: ICC ODI rankings: Root re-enters top 10, Rohit closes gap on Virat
items.summary: England secured a 2-1 ODI series victory against India, marking their first since 2018. Joe Root returned to the top ten in ICC rankings after a stellar series performance. Ben...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Root back in top ten of ODI batting rankings; Rohit closes in on top three
items.summary: Shubman Gill and Virat Kohli remain second and third, behind No. 1 Daryl Mitchell
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
